stories.summary: President Trump, facing criticism for a potential Iran deal, declared himself "the boss" while threatening renewed military action. Critics argue the proposed Memorandum of Understanding offers Iran significant concessions, including sanctions relief and asset unfreezing, in exchange for vague nuclear assurances. This has sparked domestic debate and bipartisan opposition in Congress.
